title: The Sustainable Product Life Cycle
description: A circular flowchart illustrating the five key stages of a product's life cycle from a Green IT perspective, emphasizing the continuous loop of sustainable practices.
relationships: Each stage flows sequentially into the next, with 'Recycling & Recovery' feeding recovered materials back into the 'Design & Material Sourcing' stage, creating a closed-loop system that minimizes waste and reduces the need for virgin resources.
